project: Model Atlas — Phase 1 Search Experience and Coverage
description: Turn the existing Orama search-document baseline into a usable Phase 1 search experience: global dialog and /search page that query static documents for grouped-query attention and token, display title/summary/kind/tags/URL on every hit, satisfy GQA and token discovery checks, and lock behavior with deterministic Bun tests—without adding Phase 2 glossary pages.

context.customerAsk: Phase 1 completion: turn the existing Orama/search-document baseline into a usable search experience for the sample site surface. Implement a search page or dialog entry that queries the static search documents for the Phase 1 records and displays result title, summary, kind, tags, and URL. Search must find grouped-query attention by title, alias GQA, tag attention, and body text KV cache, and must find token by title and body/alias text. Add deterministic Bun tests for the search document builder/index and UI-facing search helper behavior. Do not add Phase 2 glossary pages.
context.problem: Search indexes Phase 1 content and partial tests exist for grouped-query attention, but readers lack a bookmarkable /search results experience, token queries are not covered by API/client tests, result rows omit canonical URLs, and the Phase 1 manual search gate remains incomplete.
context.solution: Extend the existing src/lib/search pipeline and src/features/docs/search UI: add ranking tests for GQA and token, shared result rows showing full metadata, upgrade the global dialog, implement /search with inline query and results using the static Orama client, and wire home/tag handoffs—indexing only published Phase 1 docs pages.

acceptanceCriteria: Global search dialog opens from shell trigger and keyboard shortcut with loading, empty, and success states.
/search accepts queries (and optional ?q= / ?tag= prefill) and lists results with title, summary, kind, tags, and URL for each hit.
Queries GQA, attention, and KV cache (normalized variants) discover grouped-query attention; queries Token, tokens, and tokenizer discover the token glossary.
Search indexes only published Phase 1 docs pages; no new Phase 2 glossary pages are added.
Deterministic Bun tests cover buildSearchDocuments, Orama snapshot export, docsSearchApi ranking, createDocsSearchClient, and UI result-meta helpers.
Result presentation is shared between dialog and /search page using localized message keys.
Typecheck, lint, and tests pass via make ci.

userStories.title: Lock Phase 1 search document builder coverage
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I need deterministic tests proving Phase 1 search documents include the fields Orama uses for GQA and token discovery.
acceptanceCriteria: buildSearchDocuments produces grouped-query attention with title Grouped-Query Attention, KV cache in description, GQA alias, attention and kv-cache tags, and GQA/KV-cache body text.
buildSearchDocuments produces token glossary with title Token, glossary kind, token aliases, and tokenizer/token IDs body text.
Document count for the default locale matches published docs pages only (no Phase 2 glossary expansion).
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Verify Orama snapshot export for Phase 1 records
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I need a static Orama snapshot that includes every Phase 1 indexed page so static search mode works in CI and production builds.
acceptanceCriteria: exportOramaIndexSnapshot returns version 1 with Orama payload and documents for grouped-query attention and token URLs.
Snapshot preserves title, description, kind, tags, and url per indexed document.
build-search-index script writes generated snapshot successfully when only Phase 1 pages exist.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add search API ranking tests for GQA and token queries
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I need API-level tests that prove Orama ranking finds grouped-query attention and token for the Phase 1 manual gate queries.
acceptanceCriteria: docsSearchApi.search(GQA) ranks grouped-query attention first; title and attention queries include it among results.
docsSearchApi.search(KV cache), kv cache, and kv-cache each include grouped-query attention among results.
docsSearchApi.search(Token) ranks token glossary first; tokens and tokenizer queries include token among results.
docsSearchApi.staticGET returns advanced index payload for the static client.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add UI-facing search client and meta helper tests
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I need tests on the client wrapper and result-meta helpers so UI regressions are caught without browser automation.
acceptanceCriteria: createDocsSearchClient ranks grouped-query attention for GQA and includes it for attention and KV cache using mocked static export.
createDocsSearchClient includes token glossary for Token, tokens, and tokenizer queries using mocked static export.
resolveSearchResultMeta returns kind, description, and tags for grouped-query attention and token URLs.
getMatchedTags highlights attention when the query matches tag slugs or aliases.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Shared search result presentation with full metadata
userStories.description: As a reader, I want every search hit to show title, summary, kind, tags, and URL so I can choose the right page before navigating.
acceptanceCriteria: Shared component renders page results with title, summary from meta description, localized kind label, matched tag chips, and canonical URL path.
Non-page hits fall back to default Fumadocs list item without layout breakage.
Kind labels and empty copy resolve from localized UI messages.
Unit test asserts rendered output includes URL, kind label, and summary for fixture meta.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Upgrade global search dialog experience
userStories.description: As a reader, I want to open search from anywhere via keyboard shortcut and see rich, accessible results immediately.
acceptanceCriteria: ModelAtlasSearchDialog uses shared result component with loading, empty, and success states via localized messages.
Cmd/Ctrl+K opens dialog; Escape closes; arrow keys navigate; focus rings use ring token.
Query GQA shows grouped-query attention with kind, summary, tags, and URL visible before navigation.
SearchTrigger remains in docs-shell header on discovery routes.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser: keyboard shortcut opens search, GQA query shows full metadata for grouped-query attention.

userStories.title: Implement /search page with inline query and results
userStories.description: As a reader, I want a bookmarkable search page that runs the same static index as the dialog and lists full result metadata.
acceptanceCriteria: /search renders in DocsShell with localized title and description from message keys.
Page search input uses static Orama client with debounced updates and shared result component showing title, summary, kind, tags, and URL.
Selecting a result navigates to the docs URL; ?q= prefills input; optional ?tag= seeds attention-style queries.
Empty state suggests GQA or /tags/attention; loading state avoids layout shift.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser: /search?q=GQA and /search?q=Token show correct top results with visible URL paths.

userStories.title: Wire discovery handoffs to search entry
userStories.description: As a reader coming from home or tag landings, I want one-click paths into search with a helpful prefilled query.
acceptanceCriteria: Home search entry opens dialog or links to /search consistently with the documented primary entry pattern.
Tag search handoff on /tags/attention prefills attention in dialog or /search.
Primary navigation includes Search link to /search when sibling entry-routes nav is present.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser: tag attention handoff prefills attention and surfaces grouped-query attention in results.
